title: Trading & Wholesale
metaTitle: ERP & Invoicing for Trading & Wholesale Businesses · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free invoicing plus real-time stock, purchase orders and multi-currency for traders, importers and wholesalers. Quote, sell and reconcile faster. Works worldwide.
keywords: trading software, wholesale erp, distributor invoicing, import export software, purchase order software, multi-currency trading, stock control for traders
heroTitle: Buy, sell and stock with one clear ledger
heroSubtitle: From the purchase order to the customer invoice, Paper & Pen keeps your goods, costs and cash in sync. Quote fast, move stock without guesswork and know your margin on every deal.
heroBullets: Buy in one currency, sell in another

features.title: Quote to invoice
features.desc: Turn a quotation into a sales order and invoice in two clicks, no re-typing.

features.title: Real-time stock
features.desc: Every sale and purchase moves stock instantly across all your warehouses.

features.title: Purchase orders
features.desc: Raise POs to suppliers, receive goods and update stock and cost in one flow.

features.title: Multi-currency
features.desc: Buy in USD or EUR and sell in OMR, AED or SAR, with correct decimals throughout.

features.title: Margin on every deal
features.desc: See cost, price and profit per line so you never sell below your floor.

features.title: Auto reconciliation
features.desc: Invoices, payments and stock movements post to your books automatically.

sections.title: Quote today, deliver tomorrow
sections.body: In trading, the first clean quote often wins the order. Build a professional quotation in minutes, send it on WhatsApp or email, and convert the approved one into a sales order, delivery note and invoice without entering anything twice. Your customer gets a polished document; you keep a clean trail.
items: Quotation to sales order to invoice in clicks
Delivery notes and packing built in
Share instantly on WhatsApp or email

sections.title: Stock and margin that tell the truth
sections.body: Importers and wholesalers live and die on margin. Paper & Pen values your stock with average or FIFO costing and shows profit per line as you quote, so you price with confidence. Buy abroad in one currency and sell at home in another while the books stay reconciled. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR plus 5% VAT, and just as comfortable with USD, EUR or any tax rate you set.
items: Average or FIFO costing for accurate value
GCC VAT or any tax rate, any currency

faqs.q: Can I quote in one currency and buy stock in another?
faqs.a: Yes. Purchase in USD, EUR, CNY or any currency and sell in OMR, AED, SAR or whatever your customers use. Decimals and totals adjust automatically and the books stay reconciled.
Yes. Every invoice reduces stock and every purchase order receipt increases it in real time, across multiple warehouses, with no manual counts.

faqs.q: Can I see my profit margin per item?
faqs.a: Yes. Paper & Pen shows cost, selling price and margin on each line as you build a quote or invoice, so you protect your floor on every deal.

faqs.q: Is it really free for a trading business?
faqs.a: Sales and Invoicing is free forever, including quotations, invoices and delivery notes. Add the Inventory module when you need real-time stock and landed cost.

faqs.q: Does it handle VAT for the GCC and other markets?
faqs.a: Yes. Apply 5% GCC VAT out of the box, or configure any tax rate for any country. Tax is always calculated on the net after discount.

ctaTitle: Run your trade on one clean ledger
ctaSub: Start free with quoting and invoicing, then add Inventory and Accounting as your trade grows.
